_comment: Template written by scripts/maintenance_worker_install.py. Do NOT edit manually. The install script replaces PLACEHOLDER fields at install time.
_dry_run_floor_note: The 30-day dry-run floor is enforced by maintenance_worker.core.install_metadata.enforce_dry_run_floor(). floor_days=30 is hardcoded in FLOOR_EXEMPT_TASK_IDS. This file is immutable after first write — ImmutableMetadataError is raised on any subsequent write attempt.
_exempt_task_ids_note: zero_byte_state_cleanup and agent_self_evidence_archival are floor-exempt (hardcoded in FLOOR_EXEMPT_TASK_IDS frozenset, not configurable here).
